prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.3L 20V turbocharged inline-5 (engine code: **RR**) from the Audi Ur-Quattro, utilizing a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger with a custom **034 Motorsport** billet aluminum intake manifold and **Bosch 0 280 155 996** high-flow injectors for 350+ HP on **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management

Full **HJS 200-cell metallic catalytic converter** exhaust system with **Supersprint 63.5mm stainless steel headers** and a **Scorpion 76mm titanium cat-back**, paired with a **Vibrant 1799** resonated muffler for optimized scavenging and Euro-spec sound compliance

Custom **KW Suspension Variant 3 coilovers** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs**, **Meyle HD control arms** with **polyurethane bushings**, and **AP Racing CP5270-2600** 4-piston front calipers with **Ferodo DS2500** pads clamping **332mm Brembo 09.9734.75** rotors for Group B-inspired handling and braking
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Audi Coupe GT-specific) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares**, **polycarbonate rear quarter windows**, and **OEM+ Audi Sport quattro S1-inspired front splitter** (hand-laid carbon fiber by **Seibon**)

**Hella Rallye 3000 (E-code) headlights** with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **Lux H1 55W bulbs**, paired with **DEPO JDM-style smoked taillights** and **Osram Night Breaker Laser** fog light bulbs for period-correct Group 4 aesthetics

**BBS RS 012 16x8 ET20 wheels** (80s Audi Sport spec) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Corsa 225/50R16 tires**, powder-coated **Gunmetal Grey (RAL 7000)**, with **H&R Trak+ 15mm spacers** for aggressive flush fitment and **OMP 80s-style 3-inch racing harnesses** in the Recaro SRD seats
